tools.name: get_now_playing
tools.description: Returns the song currently on air: title, artist, album, artwork URL, start time, and stream URL.

tools.name: get_listener_count
tools.description: Returns the current live listener count across all mounts, plus per-mount breakdown.

tools.name: search_song_history
tools.description: Returns the most recently played songs (up to 25). Optionally filter by keyword in title or artist.

tools.name: get_fire_restrictions
tools.description: Returns current fire restriction level and fire danger rating for the Sedona / Coconino National Forest area. Includes any active Stage 1 or Stage 2 restrictions and Sedona-area alerts.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Returns current conditions and a 7-day forecast for Sedona AZ from Open-Meteo (free, no key required).

tools.name: get_road_conditions
tools.description: Returns active road and trail closures for the Sedona / Oak Creek area from the Coconino National Forest alerts page. Also includes AZ511 highway incidents for Yavapai and Coconino counties when the AZ511_KEY environment variable is set.

tools.name: get_concerts
tools.description: Returns upcoming concerts and shows sourced from KAZM's data, primarily AZ and regional venues.

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Returns upcoming local Sedona events including library events and festivals.

tools.name: get_stream_url
tools.description: Returns the live audio stream URLs for KAZM (MP3 and AAC mounts) plus the station web player URL.

tools.name: get_show_schedule
tools.description: Returns KAZM's weekly on-air program schedule. Optionally filter by day (weekday, saturday, sunday) or show name keyword.

tools.name: get_horoscope
tools.description: Returns daily, weekly, and monthly horoscopes for all signs or a specific sign.

tools.name: get_schumann_resonance
tools.description: Returns the current Schumann resonance reading — Earth's electromagnetic pulse measured at the Tomsk observatory. Includes frequency, energy score, activity level, and spectrogram URL.

tools.name: search_song_request_library
tools.description: Search KAZM's requestable song library by artist or title keyword. Returns matching tracks the DJ can play on request.

tools.name: get_rewind
tools.description: Returns available on-demand rewind blocks — past KAZM broadcasts you can listen to, with dates and stream URLs.

tools.name: get_jeep_trails
tools.description: Returns Sedona jeep trail names available on the KAZM trail map. Pass a trail name to get its GPS coordinate path.

tools.name: get_movies
tools.description: Returns current movie showings at Sedona-area theaters (Mary D. Fisher Theatre, Harkins Sedona 6, and others).

tools.name: get_emergency_alerts
tools.description: Returns active Emergency Alert System (EAS) alerts for the Sedona area — Yavapai and Coconino counties. Covers weather emergencies, evacuation orders, Amber Alerts, and all FEMA IPAWS-distributed alerts. Data is live from the National Weather Service public API.

tools.name: submit_song_request
tools.description: Submit a song request to KAZM 106.5 FM & 780 AM via the station website. Searches the real studio library, then logs the request for the DJ — every request gets read. Provide both song title and artist for best results.

tools.name: get_local_news_headlines
tools.description: Returns the latest Sedona and Verde Valley local news headlines. Pulls live from the Sedona Red Rock News and Verde Independent RSS feeds. Covers local government, arts, community events, real estate, and Verde Valley news.

tools.name: get_air_quality
tools.description: Returns current air quality index (AQI) and pollutant readings for Sedona, AZ from Open-Meteo. Includes US AQI category, PM2.5, PM10, ozone, and UV index. Especially useful during wildfire season for tracking smoke and outdoor safety.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_road_conditions" references sensitive artifacts (environment variable). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Returns active road and trail closures for the Sedona / Oak Creek area from the Coconino National Forest alerts page. Also includes AZ511 highway incidents for …

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_now_playing, get_stream_url, get_schumann_resonance, get_rewind, get_local_news_headlines · Private data: get_road_conditions · Public sink: submit_song_request.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_now_playing, get_stream_url, get_schumann_resonance, get_rewind, get_local_news_headlines · Private data: get_road_conditions · Public sink: submit_song_request

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
